testcase.name: test_11_create_item_with_main_categories
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_60_features.py:280: in test_11_create_item_with_main_categories headers=self.get_headers() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration_60_features.py:49: in get_headers return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {self.get_auth_token()}"} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration_60_features.py:42: in get_auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 10 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
